title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
